Name: GRASS_LOD_RANGE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters used for grass LOD ranges.

Fields.Name: LOD 0: Switch Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which to switch drawing method for LOD0 cluster type.

Fields.Name: LOD 0: Fade Start
Fields.Description: The distance at which to start fading LOD0 cluster type.

Fields.Name: LOD 1: Switch Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which to switch drawing method for LOD1 cluster type.

Fields.Name: LOD 1: Fade Start
Fields.Description: The distance at which to start fading LOD1 cluster type.

Fields.Name: LOD 2: Switch Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which to switch drawing method for LOD2 cluster type.

Fields.Name: LOD 2: Fade Start
Fields.Description: The distance at which to start fading LOD2 cluster type.
